home.title: Welcome to price|manager
home.description: This is the start page. Here are some shortcuts to the listing pages:

groups.title: Groups
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected groups?

countries.title: Countries
countries.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected countries?

channels.title: Channels
channels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected channels?

appPermissions.title: App Permissions
appPermissions.dangerWarning: Editing or deleting permissions can lock users out of the application. Proceed only if you have a superuser available and understand the impact.
appPermissions.deleteWarning: Deleting this permission can break application access. Continue?
appPermissions.deleteSelectedWarning: Deleting {{count}} permission(s) can break application access. Continue?

appRoles.title: App Roles
appRoles.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected app roles?

serviceInitialization.title: Service Initialization
serviceInitialization.description: Initialize service data manually. Select the data you want to load and click the Load Data button.
serviceInitialization.essentialDataDescription: Core data required for the service to function (languages, currencies, countries, units, tax classes, permissions, roles)
serviceInitialization.sampleDataDescription: Sample data for testing and demonstration (organizations, groups, channels, price rows)
serviceInitialization.refreshPermissionsHint: Reload your permissions after loading new data
